title: Fix LinkDotResolveVisitor for AstClassExtends in primary run

features.name: parameterized class with type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class declaration with a type parameter using the #(type T) syntax

features.name: class extending parameterized class with type forwarding
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a parameterized class, passing its own type parameter to the parent class
features.snippet:
class Class2 #(type T) extends Class1 #(T);
endclass

features.name: static function accessing type parameter method via scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a static function inside a class that calls a method on a type parameter using the :: operator
